CustomField.formula: AND( OR( AND(CONTAINS(TEXT(Application_Workflow_Status__c ),'Application Received'),NOT(Contains(TEXT(Application_Workflow_Status__c ),'Backup'))), OR( TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )= 'Application in Process', TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )= 'Application in Process - Alternate Property', TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )= 'Application in Process - Old Docs' ) ), AND( NOT(TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Current Owner'), NOT(TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Current Renter'), NOT(TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Failed Income Certification'), NOT(TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Failed Pre-Screen'), NOT(TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Past Renter'), NOT(TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c )=''), NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT( HOMEtracker__Status__c ),'Withdrawn')) ) )
CustomField.label: Include on Tracker
